changes.after: One line rose out of the horizon, harder than before. An ache set in behind her teeth.

changes.after: By midnight the coast was gone.

changes.feedbackRef: A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → 'not crowding, not touching. Only present.'
changes.before: Sylvanas had come to stand beside the rail stanchion, not crowding, not touching. Only present.
changes.after: Sylvanas had come to stand beside the rail stanchion and wait there.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → 'could find her fully'
changes.before: Jaina released before the answering pressure could find her fully.
changes.after: Jaina released before the answering pressure hit full force.

changes.feedbackRef: A → negation-addiction-hunting-guide.md → 'not making a second engine so much as'
changes.before: Then she slid her magic into the same motion, not making a second engine so much as shaving the worst edge off the sea's refusal where it struck.
changes.after: Then she slid her magic into the same motion, shaving the worst edge off the opposing drag where it struck.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → 'The wind found her at once.'
changes.before: The wind found her at once.
changes.after: The wind hit her at once.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → 'It had entered air and water and light themselves'
changes.before: The pressure she had been following no longer lived only in magic. It had entered air and water and light themselves, flattening all three into one harder world.
changes.after: The pressure she had been following no longer lived only in magic. Air, water, and light had all flattened into one harder world.
